meaning: vi.失败,不及格,忘记vt.使失望,舍弃,辜负,不及格n.不及格,不及格者
examples: He won't allow himself to fail.
I got three passes and one fail.
Me? Fail? I don't think so.
Republicans had argued that the provision simply preserved the too big to fail concept.
Most Indonesians convicted of murder receive much harsher sentences and see their appeals fail.
